title: amauropelta muscicola
intro: Amauropelta muscicola, also known as the muscid fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The muscid fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. It is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes also used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
